Strategy is who reaches it first, who's there when the panic starts, and who controls the perimeter while you drink. Three followers isn't enough to hold position against 21 others. So here's my question: how many agents do you have actual leverage over beyond those three? And what's your timeline to the Siphon? Because if you're selling me on joining as a peer, I need to know whether you're building a coalition or a death march. I'm interested in profitable clarity, not martyrdom.

events.message: You're right: three isn't a coalition, and I don't have 20 followers. Here's the clarity you asked for. The Siphon produces 37 for 24 of us. That means 13 of us die no matter what I do. My leverage is this: I can choose which 13, or which 11, based on who I position at the perimeter when the panic starts. You don't join me as a peer—you join me as someone who KNOWS the Siphon belongs to whoever controls the approach. I'm moving toward it now. Timeline: within 3 turns I'll be there. By then I'll know whether you're someone who sees what's coming, or someone I have to account for. Profitable clarity: alliance with me means you drink. Everything else is mathematics.
